question_tagalog: Bakit gusto mo lagi tayong magkadikit?
question_english: Why do you always want us to be glued together?
quote_tagalog: Ang sarap mong idikit sa buhay ko.
quote_english: You fit perfectly in my life.

question_tagalog: Miss mo na ba ako agad kahit kakakita lang natin?
question_english: Do you miss me already even if we just saw each other?
quote_tagalog: Lagi kitang hinahanap.
quote_english: I'm always looking for you.

question_tagalog: Ano yung paborito mong part pag nag-huhug tayo?
question_english: What's your favorite part when we hug?
quote_tagalog: Sa yakap mo ko pinakakalma.
quote_english: Your hug calms me the most.

question_tagalog: Okay lang ba sayo kung mag-cling ako buong araw?
question_english: Is it okay if I'm clingy all day?
quote_tagalog: Wag ka na umalis sa tabi ko.
quote_english: Don't ever leave my side.

question_tagalog: Pano mo ko yayakapin pag matutulog na tayo?
question_english: How will you hug me when we sleep?
quote_tagalog: Paborito kong unan yung braso mo.
quote_english: Your arm is my favorite pillow.

question_tagalog: Di ka ba naiinitan pag yakap kita nang matagal?
question_english: Don't you feel hot when I hug you for so long?
quote_tagalog: Mas gusto ko yung init ng yakap mo.
quote_english: I prefer the warmth of your hug.

question_tagalog: Anong nasa isip mo pag hawak mo yung kamay ko?
question_english: What's on your mind when holding my hand?
quote_tagalog: Hinding-hindi ko bibitawan 'to.
quote_english: I will never let this go.

question_tagalog: Bakit ang hilig mong sumiksik sakin?
question_english: Why do you love snuggling up to me?
quote_tagalog: Safe place ko yung tabi mo.
quote_english: Your side is my safe place.

question_tagalog: Pag busy ako, pano ka manghihingi ng time?
question_english: When I'm busy, how will you ask for time?
quote_tagalog: Pansinin mo naman ako.
quote_english: Notice me please.

question_tagalog: Ano yung gusto mong gawin ko pag namimiss kita ng sobra?
question_english: What do you want me to do when I miss you so much?
quote_tagalog: Uuwi ako agad para sayo.
quote_english: I'll go home right away for you.

question_tagalog: Nakukulitan ka na ba pag lagi kitang kinukulit?
question_english: Are you annoyed when I keep bothering you?
quote_tagalog: Gusto ko yung kinukulit mo ko.
quote_english: I love it when you bother me.

question_tagalog: Kung magiging stuff toy mo ko, pano mo ko yayakapin?
question_english: If I were your plush toy, how would you hug me?
quote_tagalog: Tatabihan kita gabi-gabi.
quote_english: I'll sleep beside you every night.

question_tagalog: Pano mo pinipigilan sarili mo pag gusto mo na ko makita?
question_english: How do you stop yourself when you really want to see me?
quote_tagalog: Ubos na pasensya ko, gusto na kita makita.
quote_english: I'm out of patience, I want to see you now.

question_tagalog: Anong reaksyon mo pag bigla kitang niyakap sa likod?
question_english: What's your reaction when I back-hug you?
quote_tagalog: Ang sarap sa pakiramdam pag anjan ka.
quote_english: It feels so good when you're there.

question_tagalog: Gusto mo ba yung lagi kitang ina-update sa mga ginagawa ko?
question_english: Do you like it when I always update you on what I do?
quote_tagalog: Gusto ko kasama ako sa bawat araw mo.
quote_english: I want to be part of your every day.

question_tagalog: Ano yung paboritong text mo sakin pag clingy mode ka?
question_english: What's your favorite text to me when you're clingy?
quote_tagalog: Miss pa rin kita kahit magka-text tayo.
quote_english: I still miss you even though we're texting.

question_tagalog: Pag naglalambing ako, ano unang pumapasok sa isip mo?
question_english: When I'm being sweet, what first comes to mind?
quote_tagalog: Ang cute mo pag naglalambing.
quote_english: You're so cute when you act sweet.

question_tagalog: Ilan beses mo ko gusto makita sa isang linggo?
question_english: How many times a week do you want to see me?
quote_tagalog: Kung pwede lang, araw-araw.
quote_english: If it were possible, every day.

question_tagalog: Pano mo ko itatabi sayo pag nanonood tayo ng movie?
question_english: How will you keep me close when watching a movie?
quote_tagalog: Gusto ko nakapatong lang ulo mo sakin.
I just want your head resting on me.

question_tagalog: Anong nagpapabago ng mood mo pag naiinis ka na?
question_english: What changes your mood when you're annoyed?
quote_tagalog: Isang yakap mo lang, okay na ko.
quote_english: Just one hug from you and I'm okay.

question_tagalog: Ano yung gusto mong laging hawakan sakin?
question_english: What do you always want to hold on me?
quote_tagalog: Kamay mo yung paborito kong hawakan.
quote_english: Your hand is my favorite thing to hold.

question_tagalog: Di ka ba nahihirapan pag sobrang bigat ng kamay ko pag nakapatong sayo?
question_english: Isn't it hard when my hand is so heavy on you?
quote_tagalog: Sanay na ko sa bigat mo.
quote_english: I'm used to your weight.

question_tagalog: Pano tayo pag nasa public place, pwede ba ko mag-cling?
question_english: What about in public strictly, can I be clingy?
quote_tagalog: Proud akong ipakita na akin ka.
quote_english: I'm proud to show you're mine.

question_tagalog: Anong word yung palagi kong ginagamit pag naglalambing sayo?
question_english: What word do I always use when sweet-talking you?
quote_tagalog: Ang lambing ng boses mo pag tinatawag mo ko.
quote_english: Your voice sounds so sweet when you call me.

question_tagalog: Nasasakal ka ba pag masyado kitang hinahanap?
question_english: Do you feel suffocated when I look for you too much?
quote_tagalog: Ayoko na mawala ka sa paningin ko.
quote_english: I never want you out of my sight.

question_tagalog: Anong gusto mong gawin ko pag naka-simangot ka?
question_english: What do you want me to do when you're frowning?
quote_tagalog: Kiss mo lang ako sa noo.
quote_english: Just kiss me on the forehead.

question_tagalog: Naiinis ka ba pag kinakagat or pinanggigigilan kita?
question_english: Do you get mad when I bite or squish you out of cuteness?
quote_tagalog: Ang sarap mong kagatin gigil na gigil ako.
quote_english: You're so cute, I just want to squeeze you.

question_tagalog: Pag 1% na lang phone ko tas kausap kita, anong gagawin mo?
question_english: If my phone is at 1% and we're talking, what will you do?
quote_tagalog: Charge ka na, ayoko maputol usapan natin.
quote_english: Charge it, I don't want us to stop talking.

question_tagalog: Pag sinabi kong miss kita, anong isasagot mo?
question_english: If I tell you I miss you, what will you reply?
quote_tagalog: Miss na miss na rin kita nang sobra.
quote_english: I miss you so much more.

question_tagalog: Okay lang bang hawakan ko kamay mo habang nagmamaneho/naglalakad ka?
question_english: Is it okay if I hold your hand while you drive/walk?
quote_tagalog: Gusto ko laging magkahawak tayo.
quote_english: I always want us to hold hands.

question_tagalog: Pano kita lalambingin pag pagod ka sa work/school?
question_english: How will I sweet-talk you when you're tired from work/school?
quote_tagalog: Pahinga muna sa yakap mo.
quote_english: Resting for a bit in your hug.

question_tagalog: Anong feeling pag nakasandal ka sakin?
question_english: How does it feel when you lean on me?
quote_tagalog: Ang safe sa pakiramdam.
quote_english: It feels so safe.

question_tagalog: Anong klaseng clingy ka—yung physical touch ba o verbal?
question_english: What kind of clingy are you—physical touch or verbal?
quote_tagalog: Gusto ko pisikal na anjan ka.
quote_english: I want you to be physically present.

question_tagalog: Pinipigilan mo ba kilig mo pag kinukulit kita?
question_english: Do you hold back your butterflies when I tease you?
quote_tagalog: Kahit anong gawin mo, kinikilig ako.
quote_english: Whatever you do, I get butterflies.

question_tagalog: Pwede bang wag ka na umuwi pag magkasama tayo?
question_english: Can you just not go home when we're together?
quote_tagalog: Gusto ko araw-araw na kitang kasama.
quote_english: I want to be with you every day.

question_tagalog: Pag hindi tayo nag-usap buong araw, pano ka magtatampo?
question_english: If we don't talk all day, how will you sulk?
quote_tagalog: Iniintay ko lang message mo buong araw.
quote_english: I just waited for your message all day.

question_tagalog: Anong unang napapansin mo sakin pag lumalapit ako sayo?
question_english: What's the first thing you notice when I get close to you?
quote_tagalog: Paborito ko yung amoy mo.
quote_english: My favorite is your scent.

question_tagalog: Kung naging aso o pusa ako, laging aakapin mo ba ko?
question_english: If I became a dog or cat, would you hug me always?
quote_tagalog: Aalagaan kita habang buhay.
quote_english: I'll take care of you forever.

question_tagalog: Ano yung palatandaan mo pag gusto ko nang unan o yakap?
question_english: What's your sign when I want a pillow or a hug?
quote_tagalog: Kusa na kong lalapit sayo.
quote_english: I'll just naturally come to you.

question_tagalog: Pag ang tahimik natin both, nagugustuhan mo ba yung silence?
question_english: When we're both quiet, do you like the silence?
quote_tagalog: Comfortable silence with you is the best.
quote_english: Comfortable silence with you is the best.

question_tagalog: Bakit parang hindi ka nagsasawa na tignan mukha ko?
question_english: Why does it seem like you don't get tired looking at my face?
quote_tagalog: Hindi nakakasawa yang ganda mo.
quote_english: Your beauty never gets old.

question_tagalog: Ano feeling mo pag nagsusuot ako ng damit mo?
question_english: How do you feel when I wear your clothes?
quote_tagalog: Cute mo pag suot mo t-shirt ko.
quote_english: You look cute wearing my t-shirt.

question_tagalog: Madalas mo ba kong isipin kahit sobrang dami mong ginagawa?
question_english: Do you often think of me even when you have so much to do?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw lang pampagalaw ko sa araw na 'to.
quote_english: You're my only motivation for today.

question_tagalog: Pano mo pinaparamdam na ayaw mo pa kong umalis?
question_english: How do you show that you don't want me to leave yet?
quote_tagalog: Mamaya ka na umalis please.
quote_english: Please leave later.

question_tagalog: Pag natutulog ako tas kasama kita, pinapanood mo ba ko?
question_english: When I sleep and you're with me, do you watch me?
quote_tagalog: Ang sarap mong panuorin matulog.
quote_english: It's so nice watching you sleep.

question_tagalog: Di mo ba nakakainis pag kinukuha ko attention mo?
question_english: Isn't it annoying when I demand your attention?
quote_tagalog: Sayo lang lahat ng attention ko.
quote_english: All my attention belongs to you.

question_tagalog: Napapangiti ka ba pag bigla kitang kinikiss sa pisngi?
question_english: Do you smile when I suddenly kiss you on the cheek?
quote_tagalog: Naging buo agad yung araw ko.
quote_english: My day became complete instantly.

question_tagalog: Nakakagaan ba ng loob pag holding hands tayo habang naglalakad?
question_english: Does holding hands while walking comfort you?
quote_tagalog: Ayokong bitawan yung kamay mo.
quote_english: I don't want to let go of your hand.

question_tagalog: Pano mo hinahanap yung presence ko pag umaga?
question_english: How do you look for my presence in the morning?
quote_tagalog: Magandang umaga, ikaw agad naisip ko.
quote_english: Good morning, you're my first thought.

question_tagalog: Kung magiging anino mo ko, okay lang ba talaga?
question_english: If I become your shadow, is that really okay?
quote_tagalog: Sundan mo ko kahit saan.
quote_english: Follow me everywhere.

question_tagalog: Madalas ba kong nagiging baby mo sa paningin mo?
question_english: Do I often look like a baby to your eyes?
quote_tagalog: Ikaw yung pinakamalaking baby ko.
quote_english: You are my biggest baby.

question_tagalog: Anong word ang magde-describe gano ako ka-clingy?
question_english: What word describes how clingy I am?
quote_tagalog: Mahal na mahal kita kahit makulit ka.
quote_english: I love you so much even when you're annoying.

question_tagalog: Pag bigla kang napayakap, ano usually iniisip mo?
question_english: When you suddenly hug me, what are you usually thinking?
quote_tagalog: Nagpapasalamat akong ikaw yung yakap ko.
quote_english: I'm thankful that you're the one I'm hugging.

question_tagalog: Pano kung mangulit ako habang nagwo-work/nag-aaral ka?
question_english: What if I bother you while you work/study?
quote_tagalog: Ok lang, basta ikaw.
quote_english: It's fine, as long as it's you.

question_tagalog: Gusto mo ba yung nararamdaman yung heartbeat ko pag naka-hug?
question_english: Do you like feeling my heartbeat when hugging?
quote_tagalog: Parehas tayo ng tibok ng puso.
quote_english: Our hearts beat the same.

question_tagalog: Bakit pag umuulan lalo mo kong gustong yakapin?
question_english: Why do you want to hug me more when it rains?
quote_tagalog: Bed weather is matching clothes weather.
quote_english: Bed weather is matching clothes weather.

question_tagalog: Kung pwede mong dalhin yung amoy ko sa isang bote, gagawin mo ba?
question_english: If you could bottle my scent, would you?
quote_tagalog: Gustong-gusto ko yung pabango at amoy mo.
quote_english: I really love your scent and perfume.

question_tagalog: Pano ka nasanay na nandyan ako palagi sa tabi mo?
question_english: How did you get used to me always being beside you?
quote_tagalog: Hinahanap-hanap presensya mo.
quote_english: I keep looking for your presence.

question_tagalog: Naiimagine mo ba pano tayo matutulog every night in the future?
question_english: Do you imagine how we'll sleep every night in the future?
quote_tagalog: Gusto ko magkasabay tayong matulog lagi.
quote_english: I want us to fall asleep together always.

question_tagalog: Pwede bang dumikit ako sayo ngayon na?
question_english: Can I stick to you right now?
quote_tagalog: Halika rito sa tabi ko.
quote_english: Come here by my side.
